description_long: This object is a stylized wall-mounted torch candle with a polygonal, bowl-shaped holder made of a wood-like material. The holder is supported by a short, conical stem that attaches to a rectangular mounting bracket, suggesting it is designed to be affixed to a vertical surface. Inside the bowl, a small wick is visible, surrounded by a subtle, semi-transparent flame effect. The overall design is simple and geometric, with a matte, slightly rough finish that mimics carved wood. The flame and wick are centrally positioned, and the holder is deep enough to contain the candle and catch any drips.
description: A polygonal wooden wall-mounted torch candle with a visible flame and wick, set in a bowl-shaped holder with a mounting bracket.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bowl-shaped holder, visible flame, and the rectangular wall-mount bracket extending to the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical bowl, central flame, and the conical stem beneath the holder.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the wall-mount bracket extending to the right, and the flame and wick visible in the center.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the bowl and the conical stem, with the mounting bracket not visible.
